homepage.title: 6 Decades of Precision Engineering
homepage.description: Since 1968, PEIC has been a technical partner for government and private healthcare institutions across India, delivering indigenous sterilization systems and medical technologies.

products_page.title: Solutions & Equipment Catalog
products_page.description: Indigenous manufacturing excellence and global partner technologies — engineered for clinical precision, regulatory compliance, and maximum machine uptime.

about_page.title: Heritage, Trust & Institutional Excellence
about_page.description: Established in 1968, PEIC has evolved from a precision engineering workshop into a medical equipment manufacturer and technical distributor serving institutions across India.
